testcase.classname: User Controller Auth failures GET /me → 401 when protect middleware rejects
testcase.name: User Controller Auth failures GET /me → 401 when protect middleware rejects

testcase.classname: User Controller Auth failures PATCH /me → 401 when protect middleware rejects
testcase.name: User Controller Auth failures PATCH /me → 401 when protect middleware rejects

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me 200 – returns public user profile
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me 200 – returns public user profile

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me 200 – queries DB with id from req.user
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me 200 – queries DB with id from req.user

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me 404 – when findById returns null (user deleted mid-session)
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me 404 – when findById returns null (user deleted mid-session)

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me 500 – on unexpected DB error
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me 500 – on unexpected DB error

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – cacheWrapper is called with correct key and ttl on GET /me
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – cacheWrapper is called with correct key and ttl on GET /me

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – CacheKeys.user is called with the authenticated user id
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – CacheKeys.user is called with the authenticated user id

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – on cache miss, fetchFunction calls User.findById and returns toPublic result
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – on cache miss, fetchFunction calls User.findById and returns toPublic result

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – on cache hit, User.findById is NOT called
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – on cache hit, User.findById is NOT called

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – response user data matches toPublic format from fetchFunction
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – response user data matches toPublic format from fetchFunction

testcase.classname: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – 404 when fetchFunction inside cacheWrapper returns null
testcase.name: User Controller GET /api/user/me CACHE – 404 when fetchFunction inside cacheWrapper returns null

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – updates allowed fields and returns updated profile
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – updates allowed fields and returns updated profile

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – passes { new: true, runValidators: true } to findByIdAndUpdate
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – passes { new: true, runValidators: true } to findByIdAndUpdate

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – all six allowed fields are forwarded in the update object
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – all six allowed fields are forwarded in the update object

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – strips non-whitelisted fields (role, password, __v)
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – strips non-whitelisted fields (role, password, __v)

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – empty body → update object contains no allowed fields
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – empty body → update object contains no allowed fields

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – avatar object is added to update when multer attaches a file
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – avatar object is added to update when multer attaches a file

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – old Cloudinary image is destroyed before saving new one
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – old Cloudinary image is destroyed before saving new one

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – cloudinary.destroy is NOT called when user has no prior avatar
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – cloudinary.destroy is NOT called when user has no prior avatar

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – cloudinary.destroy is NOT called when no file is in the request
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 200 – cloudinary.destroy is NOT called when no file is in the request

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 404 – when findById returns null
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 404 – when findById returns null

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on DB error from findById
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on DB error from findById

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on DB error from findByIdAndUpdate
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on DB error from findByIdAndUpdate

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on Cloudinary destroy failure (controller propagates the error)
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me 500 – on Cloudinary destroy failure (controller propagates the error)

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called with correct key after successful updateMe
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called with correct key after successful updateMe

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – CacheKeys.user is called with the authenticated user id on updateMe
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – CacheKeys.user is called with the authenticated user id on updateMe

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called even when no fields are changed (empty body)
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called even when no fields are changed (empty body)

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called after avatar upload succeeds
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is called after avatar upload succeeds

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is NOT called when findById returns null (early 404)
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is NOT called when findById returns null (early 404)

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is NOT called when findByIdAndUpdate throws
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – cacheDelete is NOT called when findByIdAndUpdate throws

testcase.classname: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – updateMe still returns correct updated user after cache invalidation
testcase.name: User Controller PATCH /api/user/me CACHE – updateMe still returns correct updated user after cache invalidation

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should create a new user successfully
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should create a new user successfully

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail when required fields are missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail when required fields are missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if email already exists
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if email already exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if username already exists
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if username already exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should reject admin role creation
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should reject admin role creation

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if role is invalid
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if role is invalid

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should login successfully with valid credentials
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should login successfully with valid credentials

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail with wrong password
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail with wrong password

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user does not exist
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user does not exist

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user account is blocked
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user account is blocked

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if emailOrUsername or password is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if emailOrUsername or password is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/logout // should logout successfully and clear cookie
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/logout // should logout successfully and clear cookie

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/logout // should still succeed even if no cookie is present
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/logout // should still succeed even if no cookie is present

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/logout // should not crash when malformed request is sent
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/logout // should not crash when malformed request is sent

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should verify email with a valid token
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should verify email with a valid token

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail with an invalid token
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail with an invalid token

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail if token is expired
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail if token is expired

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail if token is malformed
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail if token is malformed

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should resend verification email for an unverified user
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should resend verification email for an unverified user

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should return generic message if user is not found (security)
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should return generic message if user is not found (security)

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email is already verified
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email is already verified

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email field is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email field is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should send reset email if user exists
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should send reset email if user exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should NOT reveal if email does not exist (security)
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should NOT reveal if email does not exist (security)

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should fail if email is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/forgot-password // should fail if email is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should reset password with valid token
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should reset password with valid token

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should fail if password is too short
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should fail if password is too short

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should fail with invalid or expired token
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/reset-password // should fail with invalid or expired token

testcase.classname: MANUAL: Resend API config smoke test via /api/auth/resend-verification // should register a temp user and trigger resend-verification against live Resend API
testcase.name: MANUAL: Resend API config smoke test via /api/auth/resend-verification // should register a temp user and trigger resend-verification against live Resend API
